overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a video game showing a nighttime walk along a dirt trail through grassy terrain. The camera approaches a misty body of water as a wooden fence comes into view on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail approaching misty water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the misty area ahead, flanked by vegetation on both sides

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a dark dirt trail at night. The path is surrounded by moderate vegetation with bushes on the left and tall grass on the right, leading toward a misty body of water visible in the distance. The scene is dimly lit with a cool color tone, creating an atmospheric nighttime environment.

events.description: wooden fence comes into view on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path alongside the newly visible wooden fence, approaching the misty water

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence with vertical posts running along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as a wooden fence enters the scene on the right side. The fence runs parallel to the dirt trail, becoming more prominent as the camera approaches. The misty water body remains visible ahead, with the trail leading directly toward it through the dark natural surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark dirt trail that leads from a secluded natural path toward a misty waterfront. It begins with a walk through dimly lit terrain, flanked by bushes on the left and tall grass on the right under a cool, atmospheric nighttime glow. As the camera advances, the path narrows and a wooden fence emerges on the right side, running parallel to the trail. The scene then shifts focus toward the distant, fog-shrouded body of water that remains the central point of approach. Finally, the camera continues its steady forward motion, drawing closer to the water's edge as the fence becomes a prominent guide through the dark surroundings.
